mapper.sql: id, order_id, product_id, sku_id, product_name, product_image, spec_desc, unit_price, quantity, total_price, created_at
mapper.select: SELECT ordItem.id, ordItem.order_id, ordItem.product_id, ordItem.sku_id, ordItem.product_name, ordItem.product_image, ordItem.spec_desc, ordItem.unit_price, ordItem.quantity, ordItem.total_price, ordItem.created_at FROM mall_order_item ordItem INNER JOIN mall_order ord ON ordItem.order_id = ord.id WHERE ord.order_no = #{orderNo} ORDER BY ordItem.id ASC
